推荐场景: 城市活动现场｜综合故事、任务、观点、公告、协商
60秒任务: 「B1总 Boss」：B1城市任务综合；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: B1综合听力｜主旨+细节｜原因+结果｜行动项｜简单推断
场景族: 街道｜地铁站｜公交站｜出租车｜机场/车站
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
This task combines story, opinion, and action.（综合任务）
The main situation is ___.（概括情境）
The key detail changes the plan.（识别关键细节）
The reason leads to the next action.（因果行动）
One person wants ___, but the other wants ___.（识别立场冲突）
They agree because ___.（理解共识原因）
The announcement tells them to ___.（提取公告行动）
The safest next step is ___.（推断下一步）
I missed one detail, so I’ll check again.（补救听漏）
Let’s separate facts from opinions.（区分事实观点）
The fact is ___; the opinion is ___.（分类信息）
The result depends on ___.（理解条件）
So the whole message is about ___.（综合主旨）
I can explain what happened and what to do next.（总结合成）
Great, the task is complete.（任务闭环）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: situation, key detail, next action, opinion, fact, result, announcement
Verbs: combine, change, lead to, agree, separate, depend on
Adjectives / Adverbs: main, key, safest, whole
Time / Place: next, again, after the announcement, in the city
Chunks: story and opinion, key detail, separate facts from opinions, safest next step, whole message
